hero.title: Metal Packaging Manufacturer Since 1994
hero.subtitle1: Manufacturing metal cans, lids and trays for the food industry.
hero.subtitle2: Delivering consistent quality, reliable supply and long-term partnership.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.paragraph1: The company began its operations by manufacturing round and oval metal trays in various sizes with lithographic printing. To this day, we remain the market leader in this product category in Ukraine. Later, the company expanded its production to include SKO lids in sizes I-82, I-58, and I-63.
aboutUs.paragraph2: The core of Yuzhlitografmetall LLC's team consists of specialists from Chornomorpoligrafmetal JSC, formerly the largest metal packaging manufacturer in southern Soviet Union. Thanks to our in-house engineering department and mechanical workshop, we established large-scale production of deep-drawn metal cans No. 21, No. 1, No. 2, No. 3, No. 38, No. 5, No. 6, and No. 8, along with matching lids in diameters of 72.3 mm, 83.4 mm, and 99 mm.
aboutUs.paragraph3: We designed, manufactured, and commissioned our own equipment for stamping products from sheet metal and coils. From the very beginning, our company has been committed to delivering the highest quality. That is why we use premium lacquers, paints, and enamels supplied by leading European manufacturers. The certified laboratory of Chornomorpoligrafmetal JSC performs rigorous quality control of incoming raw materials as well as finished products.

features.title: OUR ADVANTAGES
features.description: Combining decades of manufacturing expertise with modern production technologies, we provide reliable solutions for industrial customers.

team.title: Experienced Team
team.description: Our team consists of highly qualified specialists with 15 to 40 years of experience in metal packaging manufacturing. Their expertise, combined with our in-house engineering solutions, enables us to consistently deliver reliable, high-quality products that meet the requirements of industrial customers.

price.title: Competitive Pricing
price.description: By optimizing the use of tinplate, production processes, and operational costs, we provide competitive pricing without compromising product quality or manufacturing standards.

volumes.title: Production Capacity
volumes.description: Our manufacturing facilities are capable of handling both medium and large production runs, ensuring stable supply volumes for food processing and packaging companies.

delivery.title: Reliable Delivery
delivery.description: We organize reliable product delivery to ensure timely shipments and uninterrupted supply for our customers.

quality.title: Quality Control
quality.description: Every stage of production is subject to strict quality control, from incoming raw materials to finished products. We work exclusively with trusted suppliers whose materials comply with European quality standards.

payment-deferral.title: Flexible Payment Terms
payment-deferral.description: For long-term partners we offer flexible payment terms, including deferred payment from 30 to 90 days through factoring agreements.
